title: BCG Cobblemon Loot
description: A datapack that adds Cobblemon related items to modded loot tables.
body:
A simple data pack that adds some interesting Cobblemon related loot drops. It currently offers support for Supplementaries.

Full list of interactions:

Poke, Great, Ultra, and Master balls can be found in urns.
Relic Coins and Pouches can be found in urns.
Related mods:

[https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon)
